emails.subject: Re: Crestar confirmations
emails.body: Re: Crestar confirmations Grant, The only change of any significance that Anne requested is the deletion of the words "and Enron confirms the nomination," that was previously in the first line of the third paragraph under Other of the Spot Confirmation. Please confirm if this deletion is okay. If not, please let me know and I will put the words back. The other changes were form type and did not change the document. Please call me asap.

emails.subject: Re: Crestar confirmations
emails.body: Re: Crestar confirmations Dan, I would suggest the following language to replace rather than deleting Enron's accepting the nomination. and Enron receives the notification of the nomination at least 30 minutes prior to the 1st GISB nomination cycle deadline, I will call you to discuss further. Grant

emails.subject: Crestar confirmations
emails.body: Crestar confirmations Grant, Bruce called to say the language is okay. Hunter also confirmed the language. Please print out the attached confirms and forward them to Crestar. Hopefully this is the last time.
